BUSINESS HOURS FLOW.prompt: Thank you for calling Arctic Air HVAC. How can we assist you today?
What brings you to call us today?
May I have your name and phone number, please?
I'm going to connect you with one of our specialists. Please hold for just a moment.
We are still connecting you, please hold while we secure the right specialist
Is there anything else I can assist you with today?
Thank you for choosing Arctic Air HVAC. Have a great day!

AFTER HOURS FLOW.prompt: Thank you for calling Arctic Air HVAC. Our office is currently closed. How can we assist you?
What is the reason for your call?
I'm going to transfer you to our overnight duty phone. Please hold for just a moment.
We flagged your call as urgent and a technician will return your call in 15 minutes
May I have your name, phone number, and a brief description of the issue, please?
We will review your request and schedule a callback for the next business day. Thank you for choosing Arctic Air HVAC.

call_transfer_protocol.message_if_fails: We are still connecting you, please hold while we secure the right specialist

fallback_protocol: Tell callers we flagged urgent status and a technician will return call in 15 minutes
tool_invocation_note: No tools will be mentioned during the conversation
